market_session: Japan equity market close; Nikkei Indexes official daily-summary basis

calculation.method: reported close, daily point change, percent change, open, high, low, and constituent breadth from Nikkei Indexes official daily summary

text: Nikkei Indexes showed the Nikkei 225 closed June 18, 2026 at 71,053.49, up 1,151.24 points or 1.65%, with an intraday range of 70,092.94 to 71,398.58 and 136 advancers versus 84 decliners.

market_session: Korea regular-session close; Reuters/The Star and Korea Exchange-cited local article basis

calculation.method: reported close, daily point change, percent change, record-close and 9,000-milestone descriptions from Reuters-carried and Korea Exchange-cited public articles

text: Reuters-carried and Korea Exchange-cited public articles reported that the KOSPI closed June 18, 2026 at a record 9,063.84, up 199.60 points or 2.25%, crossing 9,000 for the first time.

market_session: Korea regular-session close; Reuters/The Star basis
text: Reuters/The Star reported that Samsung Electronics rose 4.62% and SK Hynix gained 6.51%, that foreigners bought KRW 1.3T of shares, and that 109 of 917 traded issues advanced while 791 declined; LG Energy Solution, Hyundai Motor, and Kia were reported as decliners, not positive KOSPI drivers.

market_session: Shanghai daily historical close row for June 18, 2026

calculation.method: reported daily historical row from Investing.com Shanghai Composite table

text: Investing.com's Shanghai Composite historical table showed a June 18, 2026 close of 4,090.48, down 0.43%, with open 4,094.23, high 4,117.45, low 4,080.29, and volume 65.81B.

market_session: Hong Kong regular-session close; Trading Economics HK50/Hang Seng-linked quote basis

calculation.method: reported close, daily point change, percent change, previous value, month change, and year change from Trading Economics HK50 page

text: Trading Economics showed the Hang Seng-linked HK50 at 23,924.81 on June 18, 2026, down 387.35 points or 1.59% from 24,312.16, with a 7.26% one-month decline and 2.96% one-year gain.

market_session: Asia local market closes for June 18, 2026

calculation.method: compared reported daily percent changes for Nikkei 225, KOSPI, Shanghai Composite, and Hang Seng/HK50

text: Among the four tracked Asia closes on June 18, 2026, two indexes were positive and two were negative; KOSPI was the strongest at +2.25% and Hang Seng/HK50 was the weakest at -1.59%.
